					<h1 id="firstHeading" class="firstHeading mw-first-heading"><span class="mw-page-title-main">List of Formula One drivers</span></h1>
							
<div id="p-lang-btn" class="vector-dropdown mw-portlet mw-portlet-lang"  >
	<input type="checkbox" id="p-lang-btn-checkbox" role="button" aria-haspopup="true" data-event-name="ui.dropdown-p-lang-btn" class="vector-dropdown-checkbox mw-interlanguage-selector" aria-label="Go to an article in another language. Available in 37 languages"   >
	<label id="p-lang-btn-label" for="p-lang-btn-checkbox" class="vector-dropdown-label cdx-button cdx-button--fake-button cdx-button--fake-button--enabled cdx-button--weight-quiet cdx-button--action-progressive mw-portlet-lang-heading-37" aria-hidden="true"  ><span class="vector-icon mw-ui-icon-language-progressive mw-ui-icon-wikimedia-language-progressive"></span>

	</label>
	<div class="vector-dropdown-content">

		<div class="vector-menu-content">
			
			<ul class="vector-menu-content-list">
				
				<li class="interlanguage-link interwiki-ar mw-list-item"><a href="https://ar.wikipedia.org/wiki/%D9%82%D8%A7%D8%A6%D9%85%D8%A9_%D8%B3%D8%A7%D8%A6%D9%82%D9%8A_%D9%81%D9%88%D8%B1%D9%85%D9%88%D9%84%D8%A7_1" title="قائمة سائقي فورمولا 1 – Arabic" lang="ar" <figure typeof="mw:File/Thumb"><a href="/wiki/File:F1_drivers_by_country_-_champions,_GP_winners,_participants.svg" class="mw-file-description"><img src="//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/5/52/F1_drivers_by_country_-_champions%2C_GP_winners%2C_participants.svg/330px-F1_drivers_by_country_-_champions%2C_GP_winners%2C_participants.svg.png" decoding="async" width="300" height="152" class="mw-file-element" srcset="//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/5/52/F1_drivers_by_country_-_champions%2C_GP_winners%2C_participants.svg/500px-F1_drivers_by_country_-_champions%2C_GP_winners%2C_participants.svg.png 1.5x, //upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/5/52/F1_drivers_by_country_-_champions%2C_GP_winners%2C_participants.svg/960px-F1_drivers_by_country_-_champions%2C_GP_winners%2C_participants.svg.png 2x" data-file-width="2754" data-file-height="1398" /></a><figcaption> Countries marked in gold are those that have produced Formula 1 World Drivers' Champions. Those in green produced winners of Formula 1 Grands Prix, while those in blue – only Formula 1 race participants. <a href="/wiki/East_Germany" title="East Germany">East Germany</a> and <a href="/wiki/West_Germany" title="West Germany">West Germany</a> are combined with modern-day <a href="/wiki/Germany" title="Germany">Germany</a> into one country, while modern-day <a href="/wiki/Zimbabwe" title="Zimbabwe">Zimbabwe</a> is highlighted as a stand-in for <a href="/wiki/Rhodesia" title="Rhodesia">Rhodesia</a>.</figcaption></figure>

</tr><tr><td class="sidebar-content hlist">
<div class="sidebar-list mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="sidebar-list-title" style="border:1px solid #FF1E00; text-align:center;;color: var(--color-base)">Records</div><div class="sidebar-list-content mw-collapsible-content" style="padding-top:0.1em;padding-right:1em;padding-left:1em; text-align:center;"><div class="hlist">

</div></div></div></td>
</tr><tr><td class="sidebar-content hlist">
<div class="sidebar-list mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="sidebar-list-title" style="border:1px solid #FF1E00; text-align:center;;color: var(--color-base)">Organisations</div><div class="sidebar-list-content mw-collapsible-content" style="padding-top:0.1em;padding-right:1em;padding-left:1em; text-align:center;"><div class="hlist">
<ul><li><a href="/wiki/F%C3%A9d%C3%A9ration_Internationale_de_l%27Automobile" title="Fédération Internationale de l&#39;Automobile">FIA</a>
<ul><li><a href="/wiki/FIA_World_Motor_Sport_Council" title="FIA World Motor Sport Council">FIA World Motor Sport Council</a></li></ul></li></ul>
<hr />
<ul><li><a href="/wiki/Formula_One_Group" title="Formula One Group">Formula One Group</a>
<ul><li><a href="/wiki/Liberty_Media" title="Liberty Media">Liberty Media</a></li></ul></li></ul>

<ul><li><a href="/wiki/Formula_One_Constructors%27_Association" title="Formula One Constructors&#39; Association">Formula One Constructors' Association</a></li>

<li><a href="/wiki/Grand_Prix_Drivers%27_Association" title="Grand Prix Drivers&#39; Association">Grand Prix Drivers' Association</a></li></ul>
</div></div></div></td>
</tr><tr><td class="sidebar-navbar" style="padding-top:0"><link rel="mw-deduplicated-inline-style" href="mw-data:TemplateStyles:r1333133064" /><style data-mw-deduplicate="TemplateStyles:r1239400231">.mw-parser-output .navbar{display:inline;font-size:88%;font-weight:normal}.mw-parser-output .navbar-collapse{float:left;text-align:left}.mw-parser-output .navbar-boxtext{word-spacing:0}.mw-parser-output .navbar ul{display:inline-block;white-space:nowrap;line-height:inherit}.mw-parser-output .navbar-brackets::before{margin-right:-0.125em;content:"[ "}.mw-parser-output .navbar-brackets::after{margin-left:-0.125em;content:" ]"}.mw-parser-output .navbar li{word-spacing:-0.125em}.mw-parser-output .navbar a>span,.mw-parser-output .navbar a>abbr{text-decoration:inherit}.mw-parser-output .navbar-mini abbr{font-variant:small-caps;border-bottom:none;text-decoration:none;cursor:inherit}.mw-parser-output .navbar-ct-full{font-size:114%;margin:0 7em}.mw-parser-output .navbar-ct-mini{font-size:114%;margin:0 4em}html.skin-theme-clientpref-night .mw-parser-output .navbar li a abbr{color:var(--color-base)!important}@media(prefers-color-scheme:dark){html.skin-theme-clientpref-os .mw-parser-output .navbar li a abbr{color:var(--color-base)!important}}@media print{.mw-parser-output .navbar{display:none!important}}</style><div class="navbar plainlinks hlist navbar-mini"><ul><li class="nv-view"><a href="/wiki/Template:Formula_One" title="Template:Formula One"><abbr title="View this template">v</abbr></a></li><li class="nv-talk"><a href="/wiki/Template_talk:Formula_One" title="Template talk:Formula One"><abbr title="Discuss this template">t</abbr></a></li><li class="nv-edit"><a href="/wiki/Special:EditPage/Template:Formula_One" title="Special:EditPage/Template:Formula One"><abbr title="Edit this template">e</abbr></a></li></ul></div></td></tr></tbody></table>
<p><a href="/wiki/Formula_One" title="Formula One">Formula One</a>, abbreviated to F1, is the highest class of <a href="/wiki/Open-wheel_car" title="Open-wheel car">open-wheeled</a> <a href="/wiki/Auto_racing" title="Auto racing">auto racing</a> defined by the <a href="/wiki/F%C3%A9d%C3%A9ration_Internationale_de_l%27Automobile" title="Fédération Internationale de l&#39;Automobile">Fédération Internationale de l'Automobile</a> (FIA), motorsport's world governing body.<sup id="cite&#95;ref-1" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-1"><span class="cite-bracket">&#91;</span>1<span class="cite-bracket">&#93;</span></a></sup> The "formula" in the name refers to a set of rules to which all participants and cars must conform.<sup id="cite&#95;ref-2" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-2"><span class="cite-bracket">&#91;</span>2<span class="cite-bracket">&#93;</span></a></sup> Each year, the <a href="/wiki/List_of_Formula_One_seasons" title="List of Formula One seasons">F1 World Championship season</a> is held. It consists of a series of races, known as <a href="/wiki/List_of_Formula_One_Grands_Prix" title="List of Formula One Grands Prix">Grands Prix</a>, held usually on purpose-built <a href="/wiki/List_of_Formula_One_circuits" title="List of Formula One circuits">circuits</a>, and in a few cases on <a href="/wiki/Street_circuit" title="Street circuit">closed city streets</a>.<sup id="cite&#95;ref-3" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-3"><span class="cite-bracket">&#91;</span>3<span class="cite-bracket">&#93;</span></a></sup> Drivers are awarded points based on their finishing position in each race, and the driver who accumulates the most points over each championship is crowned that year's <a href="/wiki/List_of_Formula_One_World_Drivers%27_Champions" title="List of Formula One World Drivers&#39; Champions">World Drivers' Champion</a>.<sup id="cite&#95;ref-4" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-4"><span class="cite-bracket">&#91;</span>4<span class="cite-bracket">&#93;</span></a></sup> As of the <a href="/wiki/2025_Abu_Dhabi_Grand_Prix" title="2025 Abu Dhabi Grand Prix">2025 Abu Dhabi Grand Prix</a>, there have been 781 Formula One drivers from 41 different <a href="/wiki/FIA_Super_Licence#Nationality_of_drivers" title="FIA Super Licence">nationalities</a> who have started at least one of the 1,149 FIA <a href="/wiki/Formula_One" title="Formula One">World Championship races</a> since the first such event,<sup id="cite&#95;ref-SkyDriversStats&#95;5-0" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-SkyDriversStats-5"><span class="cite-bracket">&#91;</span>5<span class="cite-bracket">&#93;</span></a></sup><sup id="cite&#95;ref-6" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-6"><span class="cite-bracket">&#91;</span>6<span class="cite-bracket">&#93;</span></a></sup><sup id="cite&#95;ref-7" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-7"><span class="cite-bracket">&#91;</span>7<span class="cite-bracket">&#93;</span></a></sup> the <a href="/wiki/1950_British_Grand_Prix" title="1950 British Grand Prix">1950 British Grand Prix</a>.<sup id="cite&#95;ref-8" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-8"><span class="cite-bracket">&#91;</span>8<span class="cite-bracket">&#93;</span></a></sup>
</p><p>Seven-time champions <a href="/wiki/Michael_Schumacher" title="Michael Schumacher">Michael Schumacher</a> and <a href="/wiki/Lewis_Hamilton" title="Lewis Hamilton">Lewis Hamilton</a> hold the record for the most championships.<sup id="cite&#95;ref-8WChamps&#95;9-0" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-8WChamps-9"><span class="cite-bracket">&#91;</span>9<span class="cite-bracket">&#93;</span></a></sup><sup id="cite&#95;ref-CF1Champs&#95;10-0" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-CF1Champs-10"><span class="cite-bracket">&#91;</span>10<span class="cite-bracket">&#93;</span></a></sup> Hamilton also holds the record for the most wins with 105,<sup id="cite&#95;ref-11" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-11"><span class="cite-bracket">&#91;</span>11<span class="cite-bracket">&#93;</span></a></sup> the most pole positions with 104,<sup id="cite&#95;ref-12" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-12"><span class="cite-bracket">&#91;</span>12<span class="cite-bracket">&#93;</span></a></sup> the most points with 5018.5,<sup id="cite&#95;ref-13" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-13"><span class="cite-bracket">&#91;</span>13<span class="cite-bracket">&#93;</span></a></sup> and the most podiums with 202.<sup id="cite&#95;ref-14" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-14"><span class="cite-bracket">&#91;</span>14<span class="cite-bracket">&#93;</span></a></sup> <a href="/wiki/Fernando_Alonso" title="Fernando Alonso">Fernando Alonso</a> has entered more Grands Prix than anyone else (428) and also holds the record for the most Grand Prix starts (425).<sup id="cite&#95;ref-StatsF1ChronlogyRecord&#95;15-0" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-StatsF1ChronlogyRecord-15"><span class="cite-bracket">&#91;</span>15<span class="cite-bracket">&#93;</span></a></sup> The United Kingdom is the most represented country, having produced 163 drivers.<sup id="cite&#95;ref-16" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-16"><span class="cite-bracket">&#91;</span>16<span class="cite-bracket">&#93;</span></a></sup> Nine countries have been represented by just one.<sup id="cite&#95;ref-SkyDriversStats&#95;5-1" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-SkyDriversStats-5"><span class="cite-bracket">&#91;</span>5<span class="cite-bracket">&#93;</span></a></sup> <a href="/wiki/China" title="China">China</a> became the latest country to be represented by a driver when <a href="/wiki/Zhou_Guanyu" title="Zhou Guanyu">Zhou Guanyu</a> made his <a href="/wiki/Formula_One" title="Formula One">Formula One</a> debut at the <a href="/wiki/2022_Bahrain_Grand_Prix" title="2022 Bahrain Grand Prix">2022 Bahrain Grand Prix</a> driving for <a href="/wiki/Alfa_Romeo_in_Formula_One" title="Alfa Romeo in Formula One">Alfa Romeo</a>.<sup id="cite&#95;ref-17" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-17"><span class="cite-bracket">&#91;</span>17<span class="cite-bracket">&#93;</span></a></sup> The most recent drivers to make their Formula One debuts are <a href="/wiki/Kimi_Antonelli" title="Kimi Antonelli">Kimi Antonelli</a>, <a href="/wiki/Gabriel_Bortoleto" title="Gabriel Bortoleto">Gabriel Bortoleto</a> and <a href="/wiki/Isack_Hadjar" title="Isack Hadjar">Isack Hadjar</a>, who debuted at the <a href="/wiki/2025_Australian_Grand_Prix" title="2025 Australian Grand Prix">2025 Australian Grand Prix</a>.<sup id="cite&#95;ref-StatsF1Drivers&#95;18-0" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-StatsF1Drivers-18"><span class="cite-bracket">&#91;</span>18<span class="cite-bracket">&#93;</span></a></sup>
</p><p>This list includes all drivers who have entered a World Championship race, including 104 participants of the <a href="/wiki/Indianapolis_500" title="Indianapolis 500">Indianapolis 500</a> between <a href="/wiki/1950_Formula_One_season" title="1950 Formula One season">1950</a> and <a href="/wiki/1960_Formula_One_season" title="1960 Formula One season">1960</a> when it formed a round of the World Championship (although not being run according to Formula One rules or sanctioned by the FIA).<sup id="cite&#95;ref-19" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-19"><span class="cite-bracket">&#91;</span>19<span class="cite-bracket">&#93;</span></a></sup>
</p>
<ul class="gallery mw-gallery-packed">
	<li class="gallerycaption">Drivers with 4 or more World Championships</li>
		<li class="gallerybox" style="width: 120px">
			<div class="thumb" style="width: 118px;"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/wiki/File:Michael_Schumacher_2005_United_States_GP_(19872855)_(cropped).jpg" class="mw-file-description" title="Michael Schumacher won seven World Drivers&#39; Championship titles between 1994 and 2004."><img alt="Michael Schumacher won seven World Drivers&#39; Championship titles between 1994 and 2004." src="//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/c/c6/Michael_Schumacher_2005_United_States_GP_%2819872855%29_%28cropped%29.jpg/250px-Michael_Schumacher_2005_United_States_GP_%2819872855%29_%28cropped%29.jpg" decoding="async" width="118" height="150" class="mw-file-element" srcset="//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/c/c6/Michael_Schumacher_2005_United_States_GP_%2819872855%29_%28cropped%29.jpg/330px-Michael_Schumacher_2005_United_States_GP_%2819872855%29_%28cropped%29.jpg 1.5x, //upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/c/c6/Michael_Schumacher_2005_United_States_GP_%2819872855%29_%28cropped%29.jpg/500px-Michael_Schumacher_2005_United_States_GP_%2819872855%29_%28cropped%29.jpg 2x" data-file-width="1075" data-file-height="1365" /></a></span></div>
			<div class="gallerytext"><a href="/wiki/Michael_Schumacher" title="Michael Schumacher">Michael Schumacher</a> won seven World Drivers' Championship titles between <a href="/wiki/1994_Formula_One_World_Championship" title="1994 Formula One World Championship">1994</a> and <a href="/wiki/2004_Formula_One_World_Championship" title="2004 Formula One World Championship">2004</a>.</div>
		</li>
		<li class="gallerybox" style="width: 102px">
			<div class="thumb" style="width: 100px;"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/wiki/File:Lewis_Hamilton_2016_Malaysia_2.jpg" class="mw-file-description" title="Lewis Hamilton has won seven World Drivers&#39; Championship titles since 2008."><img alt="Lewis Hamilton has won seven World Drivers&#39; Championship titles since 2008." src="//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/1/18/Lewis_Hamilton_2016_Malaysia_2.jpg/250px-Lewis_Hamilton_2016_Malaysia_2.jpg" decoding="async" width="100" height="150" class="mw-file-element" srcset="//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/1/18/Lewis_Hamilton_2016_Malaysia_2.jpg/330px-Lewis_Hamilton_2016_Malaysia_2.jpg 2x" data-file-width="800" data-file-height="1200" /></a></span></div>
			<div class="gallerytext"><a href="/wiki/Lewis_Hamilton" title="Lewis Hamilton">Lewis Hamilton</a> has won seven World Drivers' Championship titles since <a href="/wiki/2008_Formula_One_World_Championship" title="2008 Formula One World Championship">2008</a>.</div>
		</li>
		<li class="gallerybox" style="width: 102.66666666667px">
			<div class="thumb" style="width: 100.66666666667px;"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/wiki/File:Juan_Manuel_Fangio_(circa_1952).jpg" class="mw-file-description" title="Juan Manuel Fangio won five World Drivers&#39; Championship titles between 1951 and 1957."><img alt="Juan Manuel Fangio won five World Drivers&#39; Championship titles between 1951 and 1957." src="//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/6/63/Juan_Manuel_Fangio_%28circa_1952%29.jpg/250px-Juan_Manuel_Fangio_%28circa_1952%29.jpg" decoding="async" width="101" height="150" class="mw-file-element" srcset="//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/6/63/Juan_Manuel_Fangio_%28circa_1952%29.jpg/330px-Juan_Manuel_Fangio_%28circa_1952%29.jpg 2x" data-file-width="1038" data-file-height="1547" /></a></span></div>
			<div class="gallerytext"><a href="/wiki/Juan_Manuel_Fangio" title="Juan Manuel Fangio">Juan Manuel Fangio</a> won five World Drivers' Championship titles between <a href="/wiki/1951_Formula_One_season" title="1951 Formula One season">1951</a> and <a href="/wiki/1957_Formula_One_season" title="1957 Formula One season">1957</a>.</div>
		</li>
		<li class="gallerybox" style="width: 116px">
			<div class="thumb" style="width: 114px;"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/wiki/File:Alain_Prost_2009_MEDEF_cropped.jpg" class="mw-file-description" title="Alain Prost won four World Drivers&#39; Championship titles between 1985 and 1993."><img alt="Alain Prost won four World Drivers&#39; Championship titles between 1985 and 1993." src="//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/9/97/Alain_Prost_2009_MEDEF_cropped.jpg/250px-Alain_Prost_2009_MEDEF_cropped.jpg" decoding="async" width="114" height="150" class="mw-file-element" srcset="//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/9/97/Alain_Prost_2009_MEDEF_cropped.jpg/330px-Alain_Prost_2009_MEDEF_cropped.jpg 1.5x, //upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/9/97/Alain_Prost_2009_MEDEF_cropped.jpg/500px-Alain_Prost_2009_MEDEF_cropped.jpg 2x" data-file-width="1293" data-file-height="1705" /></a></span></div>
			<div class="gallerytext"><a href="/wiki/Alain_Prost" title="Alain Prost">Alain Prost</a> won four World Drivers' Championship titles between <a href="/wiki/1985_Formula_One_World_Championship" title="1985 Formula One World Championship">1985</a> and <a href="/wiki/1993_Formula_One_World_Championship" title="1993 Formula One World Championship">1993</a>.</div>

			<div class="gallerytext"><a href="/wiki/Max_Verstappen" title="Max Verstappen">Max Verstappen</a> has won four consecutive World Drivers' Championship titles from <a href="/wiki/2021_Formula_One_World_Championship" title="2021 Formula One World Championship">2021</a> to <a href="/wiki/2024_Formula_One_World_Championship" title="2024 Formula One World Championship">2024</a>.</div>
		</li>
</ul>

.content-table-wrapper:not(.overflowed) .sticky-header.mw-sticky-header>thead{top:auto}}</style></h2><span class="mw-editsection"><span class="mw-editsection-bracket">[</span><a href="/w/index.php?title=List_of_Formula_One_drivers&amp;action=edit&amp;section=1" title="Edit section: Drivers"><span>edit</span></a><span class="mw-editsection-bracket">]</span></span></div>
<table class="wikitable">
<caption>Key
</caption>
<tbody><tr>
<th scope="col">Symbol
</th>
<th scope="col">Meaning
</th></tr>
<tr>
<td style="background: #F2CEE0">~
</td>
<td>Driver is contracted to compete in <a href="/wiki/2026_Formula_One_World_Championship" title="2026 Formula One World Championship">2026</a> and has won the <a href="/wiki/List_of_Formula_One_World_Drivers%27_Champions" title="List of Formula One World Drivers&#39; Champions">World Drivers' Championship</a>
</td></tr>
<tr>
<td style="background: #CEF2E0">*
</td>
<td>Driver is contracted to compete in 2026 and has not won the World Drivers' Championship
</td></tr>
<tr>
<td style="background: #F2E0CE">^
</td>
<td>Driver has won the World Drivers' Championship and is not contracted to compete in 2026
</td></tr></tbody></table>
<p>This list is accurate as of the <a href="/wiki/2025_Abu_Dhabi_Grand_Prix" title="2025 Abu Dhabi Grand Prix">2025 Abu Dhabi Grand Prix</a>. Drivers who only participated in Friday practice and who were not actually entered for the race are not included.
</p>

<div class="mw-heading mw-heading2"><h2 id="By_country">By country</h2><span class="mw-editsection"><span class="mw-editsection-bracket">[</span><a href="/w/index.php?title=List_of_Formula_One_drivers&amp;action=edit&amp;section=2" title="Edit section: By country"><span>edit</span></a><span class="mw-editsection-bracket">]</span></span></div>
<p>Drivers from 41 countries have entered a World Championship race. The United Kingdom is the most heavily represented with 163 drivers.<sup id="cite&#95;ref-F2-UK&#95;90-0" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-F2-UK-90"><span class="cite-bracket">&#91;</span>al<span class="cite-bracket">&#93;</span></a></sup> Second is the United States with 160; between 1950 and 1960 the American <a href="/wiki/Indianapolis_500" title="Indianapolis 500">Indianapolis 500</a> race, then rarely contested by drivers from outside the United States, was part of the World Championship (but it was not sanctioned by the FIA and was instead sanctioned by either <a href="/wiki/American_Automobile_Association" title="American Automobile Association">AAA</a> in 1950–1955 or <a href="/wiki/United_States_Auto_Club" title="United States Auto Club">USAC</a> in 1956–1960). A total of 58 American drivers have started World Championship races sanctioned by the FIA. Third is Italy with 100. Nine of these countries were represented in the very first race, the <a href="/wiki/1950_British_Grand_Prix" title="1950 British Grand Prix">1950 British Grand Prix</a>, and the most recent newly represented country is China, with <a href="/wiki/Zhou_Guanyu" title="Zhou Guanyu">Zhou Guanyu</a> making his debut at the <a href="/wiki/2022_Bahrain_Grand_Prix" title="2022 Bahrain Grand Prix">2022 Bahrain Grand Prix</a>. Statistics are accurate as of the <a href="/wiki/2025_Abu_Dhabi_Grand_Prix" title="2025 Abu Dhabi Grand Prix">2025 Abu Dhabi Grand Prix</a>.
</p>

<div class="mw-heading mw-heading2"><h2 id="Notes">Notes</h2><span class="mw-editsection"><span class="mw-editsection-bracket">[</span><a href="/w/index.php?title=List_of_Formula_One_drivers&amp;action=edit&amp;section=3" title="Edit section: Notes"><span>edit</span></a><span class="mw-editsection-bracket">]</span></span></div>
<style data-mw-deduplicate="TemplateStyles:r1327269900">.mw-parser-output .reflist-columns-2{column-width:30em}.mw-parser-output .reflist-columns-3{column-width:25em}body.skin-vector-2022 .mw-parser-output .reflist-columns-2{column-width:27em}body.skin-vector-2022 .mw-parser-output .reflist-columns-3{column-width:22.5em}.mw-parser-output .references[data-mw-group=upper-alpha]{list-style-type:upper-alpha}.mw-parser-output .references[data-mw-group=upper-roman]{list-style-type:upper-roman}.mw-parser-output .references[data-mw-group=lower-alpha]{list-style-type:lower-alpha}.mw-parser-output .references[data-mw-group=lower-greek]{list-style-type:lower-greek}.mw-parser-output .references[data-mw-group=lower-roman]{list-style-type:lower-roman}.mw-parser-output div.reflist-liststyle-upper-alpha .references{list-style-type:upper-alpha}.mw-parser-output div.reflist-liststyle-upper-roman .references{list-style-type:upper-roman}.mw-parser-output div.reflist-liststyle-lower-alpha .references{list-style-type:lower-alpha}.mw-parser-output div.reflist-liststyle-lower-greek .references{list-style-type:lower-greek}.mw-parser-output div.reflist-liststyle-lower-roman .references{list-style-type:lower-roman}</style><div>
<div class="mw-references-wrap mw-references-columns"><ol class="references" data-mw-group="lower-alpha">
<li id="cite&#95;note-Points-21"><span class="mw-cite-backlink">^ <a href="#cite_ref-Points_21-0"><sup><i><b>a</b></i></sup></a> <a href="#cite_ref-Points_21-1"><sup><i><b>b</b></i></sup></a></span> <span class="reference-text">The number of points awarded for each finishing position has varied over the years. Also, up until <a href="/wiki/1990_Formula_One_World_Championship" title="1990 Formula One World Championship">1990</a>, not all points scored by a driver contributed to their final World Championship tally. Numbers without parentheses are points that counted towards championships; numbers in parentheses are total points scored. See <a href="/wiki/List_of_Formula_One_World_Championship_points_scoring_systems" class="mw-redirect" title="List of Formula One World Championship points scoring systems">list of points scoring systems</a> for more information.<sup id="cite&#95;ref-PointsHistory&#95;20-0" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-PointsHistory-20"><span class="cite-bracket">&#91;</span>20<span class="cite-bracket">&#93;</span></a></sup></span>

href="#cite_ref-Indy_23-92"><sup><i><b>co</b></i></sup></a> <a href="#cite_ref-Indy_23-93"><sup><i><b>cp</b></i></sup></a> <a href="#cite_ref-Indy_23-94"><sup><i><b>cq</b></i></sup></a> <a href="#cite_ref-Indy_23-95"><sup><i><b>cr</b></i></sup></a> <a href="#cite_ref-Indy_23-96"><sup><i><b>cs</b></i></sup></a> <a href="#cite_ref-Indy_23-97"><sup><i><b>ct</b></i></sup></a> <a href="#cite_ref-Indy_23-98"><sup><i><b>cu</b></i></sup></a> <a href="#cite_ref-Indy_23-99"><sup><i><b>cv</b></i></sup></a> <a href="#cite_ref-Indy_23-100"><sup><i><b>cw</b></i></sup></a> <a href="#cite_ref-Indy_23-101"><sup><i><b>cx</b></i></sup></a> <a href="#cite_ref-Indy_23-102"><sup><i><b>cy</b></i></sup></a> <a href="#cite_ref-Indy_23-103"><sup><i><b>cz</b></i></sup></a></span> <span class="reference-text">Competed only in <a href="/wiki/Indianapolis_500" title="Indianapolis 500">Indianapolis 500</a> events, which were included as rounds of the World Championship from <a href="/wiki/1950_Formula_One_season" title="1950 Formula One season">1950</a> to <a href="/wiki/1960_Formula_One_season" title="1960 Formula One season">1960</a>.<sup id="cite&#95;ref-22" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-22"><span class="cite-bracket">&#91;</span>21<span class="cite-bracket">&#93;</span></a></sup></span>
</li>
<li id="cite&#95;note-ascari-26"><span class="mw-cite-backlink"><b><a href="#cite_ref-ascari_26-0">^</a></b></span> <span class="reference-text">Ascari shared podium positions with <a href="/wiki/Dorino_Serafini" title="Dorino Serafini">Dorino Serafini</a> (2nd, <a href="/wiki/1950_Italian_Grand_Prix" title="1950 Italian Grand Prix">1950 Italian Grand Prix</a>) and <a href="/wiki/Jos%C3%A9_Froil%C3%A1n_Gonz%C3%A1lez" title="José Froilán González">José Froilán González</a> (2nd, <a href="/wiki/1951_French_Grand_Prix" title="1951 French Grand Prix">1951 French Grand Prix</a>).<sup id="cite&#95;ref-1950italy&#95;24-0" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-1950italy-24"><span class="cite-bracket">&#91;</span>22<span class="cite-bracket">&#93;</span></a></sup><sup id="cite&#95;ref-1951france&#95;25-0" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-1951france-25"><span class="cite-bracket">&#91;</span>23<span class="cite-bracket">&#93;</span></a></sup></span>
</li>
<li id="cite&#95;note-GBR54-27"><span class="mw-cite-backlink">^ <a href="#cite_ref-GBR54_27-0"><sup><i><b>a</b></i></sup></a> <a href="#cite_ref-GBR54_27-1"><sup><i><b>b</b></i></sup></a> <a href="#cite_ref-GBR54_27-2"><sup><i><b>c</b></i></sup></a> <a href="#cite_ref-GBR54_27-3"><sup><i><b>d</b></i></sup></a> <a href="#cite_ref-GBR54_27-4"><sup><i><b>e</b></i></sup></a> <a href="#cite_ref-GBR54_27-5"><sup><i><b>f</b></i></sup></a> <a href="#cite_ref-GBR54_27-6"><sup><i><b>g</b></i></sup></a></span> <span class="reference-text">Seven drivers (<a href="/wiki/Alberto_Ascari" title="Alberto Ascari">Alberto Ascari</a>, <a href="/wiki/Jean_Behra" title="Jean Behra">Jean Behra</a>, <a href="/wiki/Juan_Manuel_Fangio" title="Juan Manuel Fangio">Juan Manuel Fangio</a>, <a href="/wiki/Jos%C3%A9_Froil%C3%A1n_Gonz%C3%A1lez" title="José Froilán González">José Froilán González</a>, <a href="/wiki/Mike_Hawthorn" title="Mike Hawthorn">Mike Hawthorn</a>, <a href="/wiki/Onofre_Marim%C3%B3n" title="Onofre Marimón">Onofre Marimón</a> and <a href="/wiki/Stirling_Moss" title="Stirling Moss">Stirling Moss</a>) were all credited with the same fastest lap time in the <a href="/wiki/1954_British_Grand_Prix" title="1954 British Grand Prix">1954 British Grand Prix</a>, which was worth 1 <a href="/wiki/List_of_Formula_One_World_Championship_points_scoring_systems" class="mw-redirect" title="List of Formula One World Championship points scoring systems">championship point</a> at the time. Each was credited with <style data-mw-deduplicate="TemplateStyles:r1154941027">.mw-parser-output .frac{white-space:nowrap}.mw-parser-output .frac .num,.mw-parser-output .frac .den{font-size:80%;line-height:0;vertical-align:super}.mw-parser-output .frac .den{vertical-align:sub}.mw-parser-output .sr-only{border:0;clip:rect(0,0,0,0);clip-path:polygon(0px 0px,0px 0px,0px 0px);height:1px;margin:-1px;overflow:hidden;padding:0;position:absolute;width:1px}</style><span class="frac"><span class="num">1</span>&#8260;<span class="den">7</span></span> (~0.14) of a point, although this is not shown in Fangio's total as it did not contribute to his World Championship tally.<sup id="cite&#95;ref-PointsHistory&#95;20-1" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-PointsHistory-20"><span class="cite-bracket">&#91;</span>20<span class="cite-bracket">&#93;</span></a></sup></span>
</li>
<li id="cite&#95;note-ayulo-29"><span class="mw-cite-backlink"><b><a href="#cite_ref-ayulo_29-0">^</a></b></span> <span class="reference-text">Ayulo shared a podium with <a href="/wiki/Jack_McGrath_(racing_driver)" title="Jack McGrath (racing driver)">Jack McGrath</a> (3rd, <a href="/wiki/1951_Indianapolis_500" title="1951 Indianapolis 500">1951 Indianapolis 500</a>).<sup id="cite&#95;ref-1951indy&#95;28-0" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-1951indy-28"><span class="cite-bracket">&#91;</span>24<span class="cite-bracket">&#93;</span></a></sup></span>
</li>
<li id="cite&#95;note-barth-30"><span class="mw-cite-backlink"><b><a href="#cite_ref-barth_30-0">^</a></b></span> <span class="reference-text">East German until 1957, then West German. Only the <a href="/wiki/Flag_of_Germany" title="Flag of Germany">flag of West Germany</a> is used here, because until 1959, the <a href="/wiki/Flag_of_the_German_Democratic_Republic" class="mw-redirect" title="Flag of the German Democratic Republic">flag of East Germany</a> looked exactly the same.</span>
</li>
<li id="cite&#95;note-bechem-32"><span class="mw-cite-backlink"><b><a href="#cite_ref-bechem_32-0">^</a></b></span> <span class="reference-text">Bechem competed in the <a href="/wiki/1952_German_Grand_Prix" title="1952 German Grand Prix">1952 German Grand Prix</a> under the pseudonym <a href="/wiki/Bernd_Nacke" class="mw-redirect" title="Bernd Nacke">Bernd Nacke</a>.<sup id="cite&#95;ref-31" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-31"><span class="cite-bracket">&#91;</span>25<span class="cite-bracket">&#93;</span></a></sup></span>
</li>
<li id="cite&#95;note-behra-34"><span class="mw-cite-backlink"><b><a href="#cite_ref-behra_34-0">^</a></b></span> <span class="reference-text">Behra shared a podium with <a href="/wiki/Cesare_Perdisa" title="Cesare Perdisa">Cesare Perdisa</a> (3rd, <a href="/wiki/1955_Monaco_Grand_Prix" title="1955 Monaco Grand Prix">1955 Monaco Grand Prix</a>).<sup id="cite&#95;ref-1955monaco&#95;33-0" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-1955monaco-33"><span class="cite-bracket">&#91;</span>26<span class="cite-bracket">&#93;</span></a></sup></span>
</li>
<li id="cite&#95;note-bettenhausen-36"><span class="mw-cite-backlink"><b><a href="#cite_ref-bettenhausen_36-0">^</a></b></span> <span class="reference-text">Bettenhausen shared a podium with <a href="/wiki/Paul_Russo" title="Paul Russo">Paul Russo</a> (2nd, <a href="/wiki/1955_Indianapolis_500" title="1955 Indianapolis 500">1955 Indianapolis 500</a>).<sup id="cite&#95;ref-1955indy&#95;35-0" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-1955indy-35"><span class="cite-bracket">&#91;</span>27<span class="cite-bracket">&#93;</span></a></sup></span>
</li>

<li id="cite&#95;note-hanks-57"><span class="mw-cite-backlink"><b><a href="#cite_ref-hanks_57-0">^</a></b></span> <span class="reference-text">Hanks shared a podium with <a href="/wiki/Duane_Carter" title="Duane Carter">Duane Carter</a> (3rd, <a href="/wiki/1953_Indianapolis_500" title="1953 Indianapolis 500">1953 Indianapolis 500</a>).<sup id="cite&#95;ref-1953indy&#95;42-1" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-1953indy-42"><span class="cite-bracket">&#91;</span>31<span class="cite-bracket">&#93;</span></a></sup></span>
</li>
<li id="cite&#95;note-JPN76-61"><span class="mw-cite-backlink">^ <a href="#cite_ref-JPN76_61-0"><sup><i><b>a</b></i></sup></a> <a href="#cite_ref-JPN76_61-1"><sup><i><b>b</b></i></sup></a></span> <span class="reference-text">It was initially announced that <a href="/wiki/Masahiro_Hasemi" title="Masahiro Hasemi">Masahiro Hasemi</a> set the fastest lap at the <a href="/wiki/1976_Japanese_Grand_Prix" title="1976 Japanese Grand Prix">1976 Japanese Grand Prix</a>, but it was a measurement mistake, and, several days later, the circuit issued a press release to correct the fastest lap holder of the race to <a href="/wiki/Jacques_Laffite" title="Jacques Laffite">Jacques Laffite</a>.<sup id="cite&#95;ref-58" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-58"><span class="cite-bracket">&#91;</span>39<span class="cite-bracket">&#93;</span></a></sup> This press release was promptly made known in Japan, and the <a href="/wiki/Japan_Automobile_Federation" title="Japan Automobile Federation">Japan Automobile Federation</a> (JAF) and Japanese media corrected the record.<sup id="cite&#95;ref-59" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-59"><span class="cite-bracket">&#91;</span>40<span class="cite-bracket">&#93;</span></a></sup><sup id="cite&#95;ref-60" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-60"><span class="cite-bracket">&#91;</span>41<span class="cite-bracket">&#93;</span></a></sup> But this correction was not made well known outside Japan, thus, Hasemi is credited with the fastest lap of the race in many record books.</span>
</li>
<li id="cite&#95;note-hawthorn-62"><span class="mw-cite-backlink"><b><a href="#cite_ref-hawthorn_62-0">^</a></b></span> <span class="reference-text">Hawthorn shared a podium with <a href="/wiki/Jos%C3%A9_Froil%C3%A1n_Gonz%C3%A1lez" title="José Froilán González">José Froilán González</a> (2nd, <a href="/wiki/1954_German_Grand_Prix" title="1954 German Grand Prix">1954 German Grand Prix</a>).<sup id="cite&#95;ref-1954germany&#95;54-1" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-1954germany-54"><span class="cite-bracket">&#91;</span>37<span class="cite-bracket">&#93;</span></a></sup></span>
</li>
<li id="cite&#95;note-heyer-64"><span class="mw-cite-backlink"><b><a href="#cite_ref-heyer_64-0">^</a></b></span> <span class="reference-text">Hans Heyer illegally started the race, despite the fact he did not qualify.<sup id="cite&#95;ref-63" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-63"><span class="cite-bracket">&#91;</span>42<span class="cite-bracket">&#93;</span></a></sup></span>

<li id="cite&#95;note-Russia&#95;as&#95;neutral-71"><span class="mw-cite-backlink">^ <a href="#cite_ref-Russia_as_neutral_71-0"><sup><i><b>a</b></i></sup></a> <a href="#cite_ref-Russia_as_neutral_71-1"><sup><i><b>b</b></i></sup></a></span> <span class="reference-text"><a href="/wiki/Nikita_Mazepin" title="Nikita Mazepin">Nikita Mazepin</a> is Russian, but he competed as a neutral competitor as the <a href="/wiki/Court_of_Arbitration_for_Sport" title="Court of Arbitration for Sport">Court of Arbitration for Sport</a> upheld a ban on Russia competing at World Championships. The ban was implemented by the <a href="/wiki/World_Anti-Doping_Agency" title="World Anti-Doping Agency">World Anti-Doping Agency</a> in response to <a href="/wiki/Doping_in_Russia" title="Doping in Russia">state-sponsored doping program</a> of Russian athletes.<sup id="cite&#95;ref-70" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-70"><span class="cite-bracket">&#91;</span>45<span class="cite-bracket">&#93;</span></a></sup></span>

<li id="cite&#95;note-trintignant-88"><span class="mw-cite-backlink"><b><a href="#cite_ref-trintignant_88-0">^</a></b></span> <span class="reference-text">Trintignant shared podiums with <a href="/wiki/Jos%C3%A9_Froil%C3%A1n_Gonz%C3%A1lez" title="José Froilán González">José Froilán González</a>/<a href="/wiki/Nino_Farina" class="mw-redirect" title="Nino Farina">Nino Farina</a> (2nd, <a href="/wiki/1955_Argentine_Grand_Prix" title="1955 Argentine Grand Prix">1955 Argentine Grand Prix</a>), <a href="/wiki/Nino_Farina" class="mw-redirect" title="Nino Farina">Nino Farina</a>/<a href="/wiki/Umberto_Maglioli" title="Umberto Maglioli">Umberto Maglioli</a> (3rd, <a href="/wiki/1955_Argentine_Grand_Prix" title="1955 Argentine Grand Prix">1955 Argentine Grand Prix</a>) and <a href="/wiki/Stirling_Moss" title="Stirling Moss">Stirling Moss</a> (3rd, <a href="/wiki/1960_Argentine_Grand_Prix" title="1960 Argentine Grand Prix">1960 Argentine Grand Prix</a>).<sup id="cite&#95;ref-1955argentina&#95;52-3" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-1955argentina-52"><span class="cite-bracket">&#91;</span>36<span class="cite-bracket">&#93;</span></a></sup><sup id="cite&#95;ref-1960argentina&#95;75-1" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-1960argentina-75"><span class="cite-bracket">&#91;</span>47<span class="cite-bracket">&#93;</span></a></sup></span>
</li>
<li id="cite&#95;note-F2-UK-90"><span class="mw-cite-backlink">^ <a href="#cite_ref-F2-UK_90-0"><sup><i><b>a</b></i></sup></a> <a href="#cite_ref-F2-UK_90-1"><sup><i><b>b</b></i></sup></a></span> <span class="reference-text">Three of these drivers participated in World Championship events, but as <a href="/wiki/Formula_Two" title="Formula Two">Formula Two</a> entries only: <a href="/wiki/Tom_Bridger" title="Tom Bridger">Tom Bridger</a>, <a href="/wiki/Dick_Gibson_(racing_driver)" title="Dick Gibson (racing driver)">Dick Gibson</a>, and <a href="/wiki/Brian_Hart" title="Brian Hart">Brian Hart</a> (some sources omit these drivers as a result<sup id="cite&#95;ref-89" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-89"><span class="cite-bracket">&#91;</span>52<span class="cite-bracket">&#93;</span></a></sup>). They were ineligible for points (see <a href="/wiki/List_of_Formula_One_World_Championship_points_scoring_systems" class="mw-redirect" title="List of Formula One World Championship points scoring systems">list of points scoring systems</a> for more information).</span>
</li>
</ol></div></div>
